mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) as total_count FROM dorm_fixed_asset WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND del_flag = '0' GROUP BY status
SELECT id FROM dorm_fixed_asset WHERE asset_code = #{assetCode} AND del_flag = '0' LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM dorm_fixed_asset WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status IN (50, 60) AND del_flag = '0'
SELECT a.* FROM dorm_fixed_asset a INNER JOIN dorm_room r ON a.room_id = r.id WHERE r.building_id = #{buildingId} AND a.status = 50 AND a.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY r.room_no ASC
